description: Universal-core string predicates — FAILING surface (§55.1). length(>=2) on "A" → .LengthFailed; pattern(/…/) on "nope" → .PatternMismatch. Each field's errors[0] carries the right ValidationError tag (§55.9) and isValid goes false; the compound rollup isValid is false. OQ1: whole-tree dom omitted (rendered messages are impl-freedom); the contract is the validity-surface STATE + the tag.
rationale: §55.1 length + pattern fire with the same names across all three loci; on failure §55.9 appends the tagged ValidationError to the field's errors array and drops isValid to false. The load-bearing impl-neutral contract is the tag NAME (LengthFailed / PatternMismatch). PAYLOAD-SHAPE NOTE: (a) LengthFailed carries predicate:{op,value} here while §55.9 declares predicate:string — a standing SPEC-vs-impl payload-encoding divergence (parallel to §19.9.1), asserted-as-impl#1 pending PA/spec reconciliation; (b) PatternMismatch.re snapshots as {} (a regex has no JSON form) — a serialization artifact, not a semantic claim.
